description: #360 Slice C: the real capability every plugin WebviewWindow is bound to. `windows: ["plugin-*"]` matches every window pluginbroker::plugin_open_window creates (label scheme `plugin-<id>-<seq>`). Grants exactly the plugin-broker permission set — the two broker commands (plugin_broker_request, plugin_broker_open_channel) and nothing else in the app's command surface. This is the real, populated sibling of plugin-zero-template.json (#363) — that file stays literally empty as the base template and the tests/acl_manifest.rs zero-grant proof; this one is what a shipped plugin window actually gets. Widening this beyond "plugin-broker" (and never to "main-ui") is a reviewed contract change — see doc/design/pane-plugins.md's capability model.
